extensions.name: aba
extensions.description: ABA / US bank routing number (9-digit weighted check)

extensions.name: duckdbcompat
extensions.description: DuckDB-native scalars SQLite lacks (#153 cross-compat, DuckDB->SQLite): bar(x,min,max[,width]) unicode bar, even(x), gamma(x), lgamma(x), nextafter(x,y). The already-shipped sqlink packs (bit_count, gamma_cdf/pdf, regexp/list/stdsql) are not duplicated.

extensions.name: aead
extensions.description: Authenticated encryption with associated data for SQL.

extensions.name: aes-modes
extensions.description: AES non-AEAD modes for SQL: CBC, CTR, and deterministic SIV.

extensions.name: archive-cli
extensions.description: `.archive` as a wasm dot-command extension. SQLAR (SQLite Archive Format) files are stored as rows in a `sqlar` table.

extensions.name: arrow
extensions.description: Read-only Arrow IPC vtab over a .arrow / .arrows file. Both the random-access file format (ARROW1 magic + footer) and the streaming format (sequential record batches) are auto-detected from the first 6 bytes.

extensions.name: asn1
extensions.description: ASN.1 / DER encode + decode scalars for SQL.

extensions.name: avro
extensions.description: Apache Avro encode / decode scalars. Schema-on-call (the schema travels with each value at the SQL boundary the caller passes both the data BLOB and a JSON schema string).

extensions.name: baseN
extensions.description: Compact base-N codecs not covered by SQLite's built-in `hex()` / json1's base64 helpers:

extensions.name: bencode
extensions.description: Bencode (BEP 0003) encode/decode scalars. Bencode is the wire format used by BitTorrent for .torrent files and DHT traffic.

extensions.name: bibcodes
extensions.description: Bibliographic identifier validation + canonical formatting. Sister to the aba / bic / cusip / creditcard / isin / ean checksum-flavored extensions in this catalog, except focused on the publishing world: ISBN-10, ISBN-13, ISSN, DOI, ORCID, and LCCN.

extensions.name: bic
extensions.description: BIC / SWIFT code (ISO 9362) structural validation + decomposition

extensions.name: bignum
extensions.description: Arbitrary-precision signed integer arithmetic for SQLite, exposed as scalar functions. Pairs with the small-integer extensions (`numtheory` etc.

extensions.name: binary-codecs
extensions.description: MessagePack + CBOR encode/decode scalars modern binary serialization codecs alongside SQLite's builtin JSON1. Focused counterpart to the older `codecs` bundle (which also includes YAML); this crate is binary-only and accepts SQL primitives directly without forcing the caller to J

extensions.name: blake3
extensions.description: BLAKE3 hash extension for SQLite: hash + keyed-hash + KDF (derive-key) modes, exposed as scalar functions. Pairs with sha3 (FIPS 202) and hashes-fast (xxhash / murmur3) -- where sha3 covers collision-resistance with the NIST seal, BLAKE3 is the modern choice: faster on commodity

extensions.name: bloom
extensions.description: Bloom filter scalars. Sized at create time by (n, fp_rate); two independent hash functions derived from one 128-bit xxhash via output splitting.

extensions.name: bpe
extensions.description: BPE tokenizer via tiktoken-rs. Bundles OpenAI's cl100k_base encoding by default (the GPT-3.5/GPT-4 vocab); the model is embedded in the wasm so callers don't need to ship a vocab file out-of-band.

extensions.name: bson
extensions.description: BSON (Binary JSON, MongoDB wire format) codec scalars for SQL.

extensions.name: case
extensions.description: Identifier case-conversion scalars via the `heck` crate (the same case converter Cargo uses):

extensions.name: changeset
extensions.description: Pure-function changeset helpers — Phase 1 of the session/changeset deferred work. Five scalars expose sqlite's connection-free changeset operations as SQL:

extensions.name: chrono
extensions.description: Powered datetime scalars: timezone conversion, business-day math, ISO 8601 round-trip, duration parsing/formatting. Complements SQLite's built-in date/datetime/strftime and the existing `time` extension by adding the missing tz + duration surface.

extensions.name: closure
extensions.description: Recursive graph closure vtab. Port of SQLite's `ext/misc/closure.c`. Walks a parent/child relationship across N hops and emits `(id, depth)` tuples.

extensions.name: codecs
extensions.description: Data interchange codecs CBOR, MessagePack, YAML bundled into one extension since each is just a scalar pair and they share the same serde_json::Value intermediate.

extensions.name: color
extensions.description: Color extension for SQLite.

extensions.name: color-palette
extensions.description: Dominant color palette extraction from image blobs (PNG/JPEG) via kmeans_colors 0.6 + image 0.25 + palette 0.7. Returns JSON hex arrays and dominant/average hex colors.

extensions.name: completion
extensions.description: port of SQLite completion.c vtab

extensions.name: compress
extensions.description: Compression scalars five pure-Rust algorithms exposed through two unified SQL functions, backed by Tegmentum's compression-multiplexer crate (`~/git/compression-multiplexer/`).

extensions.name: container
extensions.description: ISO 6346 shipping container code validation

extensions.name: core-dotcmd
extensions.description: Seed of the eventual full port of cli/src/dot.rs into an extension. Ports .version, .help, .tables, .schema, .databases as proof that the dotcmd-aware contract supports the built-in surface. Subsequent batches port the remaining ~30 commands until cli/src/dot.

extensions.name: cose
extensions.description: COSE (CBOR Object Signing and Encryption, RFC 8152) for SQL.

extensions.name: count_min
extensions.description: Count-Min Sketch for top-k frequency estimation. Sized at 2048 (width) 4 (depth) by default = 32 KB state, ~0.05% error with 99.99% confidence. Parameters are fixed in the v1 wire format.

extensions.name: country
extensions.description: ISO 3166-1 country codes name, region

extensions.name: crc
extensions.description: CRC-32 / CRC-64 / CRC-16 checksums (multiple polynomials)

extensions.name: creditcard
extensions.description: Credit card BIN-range type detection (Visa/MC/Amex/Discover/JCB/UnionPay) + masking

extensions.name: cron
extensions.description: Cron expression parsing + next-fire-time calculation via the `cron` crate.

extensions.name: crypto
extensions.description: SQL crypto / encoding scalars: sha1, sha256, sha512, md5, hex, unhex, base64_encode, base64_decode. All inputs/outputs are SQL TEXT or BLOB; the hash functions return hex TEXT to match SQLite's existing `hex(...)` conventions.

extensions.name: crypto-auth
extensions.description: Authentication / verification primitives — Argon2 password hashing. Historically this umbrella also exposed JWT, TOTP, and bcrypt; those have been split out into focused extensions (extensions/jwt, extensions/totp, extensions/pwhash).

extensions.name: crypto-keys
extensions.description: Key-based crypto: ed25519 sign/verify, x25519 ECDH, ChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD, and merkle-tree helpers. Complements crypto-auth (passwords + JWT) and the focused aead extension (which owns aes_gcm_*).

extensions.name: csscolor
extensions.description: CSS-conformant color parsing via `csscolorparser` 0.8. Handles the full Web Colors set: hex, rgb()/rgba(), hsl()/hsla(), hwb(), lab(), oklch(), named colors (X11 + CSS4), `transparent`.

extensions.name: csv
extensions.description: Port of SQLite's csv vtab as a wasm32-wasip2 component.

extensions.name: currency
extensions.description: ISO 4217 currency code name, symbol, decimals

extensions.name: cusip
extensions.description: CUSIP (Committee on Uniform Securities ID, US/CA) validation

extensions.name: db-utils
extensions.description: Database introspection helpers over the spi.execute import. All scalars query the host db via spi; works only with a file-backed db (--db PATH on sqlink-run).

extensions.name: decimal
extensions.description: Exact decimal arithmetic. Port of SQLite's ext/misc/decimal.c shape, backed by Rust's `bigdecimal` crate so the precision is arbitrary no float rounding for money / scientific values.

extensions.name: define
extensions.description: User-defined SQL functions stored in the database. Sibling to sqlean's `define` extension, simplified for our extension model.

extensions.name: detect
extensions.description: Small detection / canonicalization scalar pack:

extensions.name: dicom
extensions.description: DICOM (Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine) metadata extraction from medical-imaging blobs. Pulls Patient Name / ID, Study Date, Modality, Manufacturer, image dimensions, Transfer Syntax UID, and arbitrary (group, element) tag values out of DICOM Part 10 files.

extensions.name: dist
extensions.description: Statistical distributions for SQL: PDF / CDF / inverse-CDF for the common families Normal, Poisson, Binomial, Exponential, Chi-squared, Beta, Gamma, Student-t.

extensions.name: dns
extensions.description: DNS resolver scalar. Calls into the host's `dns::resolve` SPI through `world: minimal-dns`. Capability-gated:

extensions.name: docx-meta
extensions.description: OOXML document metadata extractor for SQLite. Reads the ZIP + XML structure of Office Open XML files (.docx / .xlsx / .pptx) and surfaces Core / Extended properties + a plain-text content dump to SQL scalars.

extensions.name: ean
extensions.description: EAN-13 / UPC-A barcode validation (weighted mod-10)

extensions.name: ed25519
extensions.description: Standalone Ed25519 sign/verify scalars (RFC 8032 / 8410). The `jwt` extension already has Ed25519 internally for the EdDSA JWS alg, but exposing the raw primitive as plain SQL scalars is its own surface: SSH key handling, Tor onion-service descriptors, Signal/Matrix identity keys

extensions.name: email
extensions.description: Email address validation + decomposition via the `email_address` crate (RFC 5321 / 5322 conformant).

extensions.name: emoji
extensions.description: Emoji detection / extraction / lookup over the full Unicode 16 emoji table (the `emojis` crate):

extensions.name: epub
extensions.description: EPUB e-book metadata extraction from a raw blob.

extensions.name: escape
extensions.description: Text escaping for URL / HTML / SQL string contexts (hand-rolled, no crate)

extensions.name: eval
extensions.description: port of SQLite eval.c (runtime SQL)

extensions.name: excel
extensions.description: Read-only Excel / OpenDocument Spreadsheet vtab via the `calamine` crate. Supports .xlsx / .xlsb / .xls / .ods.

extensions.name: exif
extensions.description: EXIF metadata extraction from JPEG/TIFF/PNG/HEIF/WebP blobs via kamadak-exif 0.6

extensions.name: extfns
extensions.description: extension-functions.c string scalars

extensions.name: faker
extensions.description: Generate fake test data (names, emails, addresses, etc.) via the fake crate

extensions.name: fft
extensions.description: Fast Fourier Transform extension for SQLite: forward + inverse transforms over JSON arrays, plus magnitude / phase / power-spectrum helpers and the standard window functions (hann / hamming / blackman / rect).

extensions.name: fileio
extensions.description: Filesystem helpers. Port of SQLite's ext/misc/fileio.c surface plus a few stat-flavored extras.

extensions.name: formats
extensions.description: Lighter data-format codecs bundled together: INI and XML/XPath. Bigger formats (Arrow, Parquet, Excel, Avro) get their own extensions because their crates pull substantial deps. TOML codecs live in extensions/toml.

extensions.name: fuzzy
extensions.description: String distance + phonetic codes for SQL — dedup, near-match, and typo-tolerant search. The sqlean `fuzzy` equivalent: covers the four classic distance metrics (jaro / jaro_winkler / damerau_levenshtein / levenshtein) and the four widely used phonetic encodings (soundex / metapho

extensions.name: geo
extensions.description: Compact geo-coding helpers bundled together: H3 hex grid, geohash, Maidenhead grids. None of them need the postgis- wasm composed bundle pure-Rust scalars.

extensions.name: geo-distance
extensions.description: Geo distance + bearing scalars (Haversine + Vincenty)

extensions.name: geohash
extensions.description: Geohash (Gustavo Niemeyer 2008) extension for SQLite: encode WGS84 lat/lng to a short alphanumeric string, decode a geohash back to a lat/lng pair, and enumerate the 8 neighboring cells of a hash.

extensions.name: graphql
extensions.description: GraphQL query inspection scalars via `graphql-parser`. Parses a GraphQL query string without executing it useful for audit, security checks, complexity scoring.

extensions.name: greet
extensions.description: Hello-world dot-command extension. Registers a single .greet NAME command that writes "hello NAME" to cli-stdout. Demonstrates the dotcmd-aware world from PLAN-dotcmd-plugins.md Phase 1.

extensions.name: h3
extensions.description: Uber's H3 hexagonal hierarchical geospatial index, exposed as i64 cell indices. Different surface from the existing `geo` extension's compact h3_to_cell/h3_to_geo (which uses TEXT cell hex): this extension is the "full H3 API" port, keying cells as INTEGER for fast PK / FK use.

extensions.name: hashes-fast
extensions.description: Fast non-cryptographic hashes for SQLite: xxh3 (64 + 128), xxh64, xxh32, murmur3_32, murmur3_128. Companion to the sha3 extension -- where sha3 covers integrity / collision-resistance, these cover the sub-nanosecond regime used by bloom filters, sharding, consistent hashing, and

extensions.name: hexdump
extensions.description: Hex-dump formatting for binary BLOBs. Renders bytes in the classic `hexdump -C` style with offset, hex pairs, and ASCII gutter.

extensions.name: hkdf
extensions.description: HKDF (HMAC-based Extract-and-Expand Key Derivation Function, RFC 5869) for SQLite. SHA-256 + SHA-512 variants, exposed as scalar functions covering the single-call form plus the explicit extract / expand two-step.

extensions.name: hookprobe
extensions.description: Test-bench extension for the dispatch-bridge hook trampolines. Exports authorizer + update-hook + commit-hook so the composed cli's spi-loader.register-{authorizer,update-hook,commit-hook} calls have a real component to route to. Used by the browser spec composed-hooks.spec.

extensions.name: hpke
extensions.description: Hybrid Public Key Encryption (RFC 9180) for SQL.

extensions.name: html
extensions.description: HTML text extraction, CSS-selector queries, entity codec, and convenience helpers (title / links / images) for SQL. Backed by `scraper` (html5ever, the same parser Servo uses) for liberal real-world HTML5 parsing, plus `html-escape` for the entity codec.

extensions.name: http
extensions.description: HTTP scalars. Wraps the host's `sqlite:extension/http` import the host's implementation does the actual request via reqwest with policy enforcement (allowed-hosts / allowed-methods) gating every call.

extensions.name: http-signature
extensions.description: HTTP Message Signatures (RFC 9421) for SQL.

extensions.name: humansize
extensions.description: Humanize bytes + durations; bidirectional parse

extensions.name: hyperloglog
extensions.description: HyperLogLog cardinality estimation. p=14 (16 KB state, ~0.8% standard error). Standard LogLog-Beta finalize for the bias correction across the small / medium / large cardinality regimes.

extensions.name: hyphenation
extensions.description: Liang/Knuth-Plass hyphenation for SQL — backed by the `hyphenation` 0.8 crate (Tex-style patterns). The classic Liang algorithm computes valid word-break opportunities; the Knuth-Plass typesetter then chooses where to actually break a line.

extensions.name: hypothesis
extensions.description: Statistical hypothesis tests for SQL. Companion to `dist` (which gives PDF / CDF / inverse-CDF for the standard distribution families) this extension consumes those same distributions to produce p-values for the textbook tests:

extensions.name: iban
extensions.description: IBAN ISO 13616 international bank account number validation + decomposition (mod-97 / ISO 7064).

extensions.name: ical
extensions.description: iCalendar (RFC 5545) parsing scalars via the `icalendar` crate. Lets SQL queries inspect .ics content without needing a calendar-aware client.

extensions.name: id3
extensions.description: ID3 tag parsing (v1, v2.3, v2.4) for MP3 blobs via the id3 1.x pure-rust crate.

extensions.name: idna
extensions.description: Internationalized Domain Name (IDN) and Punycode scalars. Lets SQL queries deal with `xn--` ascii- compatible encodings and their unicode display forms on equal footing.

extensions.name: ids
extensions.description: ID generators ULID, nanoid, snowflake bundled together. Complements the existing uuid extension.

extensions.name: ieee754
extensions.description: IEEE 754 float introspection. Port of SQLite's ext/misc/ieee754.c to the canonical `sqlite:extension/minimal` world. Pure-Rust no FFI needed; f64::to_bits / from_bits already expose the mantissa + exponent split we need.

extensions.name: image-meta
extensions.description: Image header metadata: format/width/height/dimensions from blob headers via the imagesize 0.13 pure-rust header-only decoder. NULL/unrecognized -> NULL on every fn.

extensions.name: inmem
extensions.description: Writable in-memory key/value table — vtab-mutating proof of correctness. Demonstrates the full xUpdate / xBegin / xCommit / xRollback / xRename surface on both the WIT and embed paths.

extensions.name: ipaddr
extensions.description: IP address / CIDR scalar helpers. Single-purpose extension sibling to sqlean-ipaddr's surface.

extensions.name: isin
extensions.description: ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) ISO 6166 validation

extensions.name: iso-639-5
extensions.description: ISO 639-5 language family / collection codes (~115 entries). The sister `iso-codes` extension covers individual languages (639-1 / -2 / -3) but stops short of family roll-ups: it can tell you that 'fr' is French, not that French is in `roa` (Romance) which is in `itc` (Italic) wh

extensions.name: iso-codes
extensions.description: ISO codes triad: 3166-1 country (249), 4217 currency (~180), 639 language (~180). Each surface is name + alpha-2/alpha-3 inter- conversion + numeric/minor-units + validation, with NULL on unknown codes for clean SQL composition.

extensions.name: json-table
extensions.description: `unnest(V)` — eponymous TVF that yields one row per element of a packed f32 vector. Sibling to extensions/vec (the scalar surface) and extensions/vec0 (the kNN vtab).

extensions.name: json1
extensions.description: Port of the SQLite json1 extension as a wasm32-wasip2 component.

extensions.name: json5
extensions.description: JSON5 -> canonical JSON codec scalars.

extensions.name: jwt
extensions.description: JSON Web Tokens (RFC 7519) for SQL.

extensions.name: lang-detect
extensions.description: Language detection from text via the `whatlang` n-gram detector. Exposes ISO 639-3 / 639-1 codes, script names, confidence scores, and a top-3 candidate JSON dump. Pairs with `stemmer` (Snowball) for multi-language text pipelines.

extensions.name: latlon
extensions.description: Lat/lon format conversion: decimal, DMS, DDM

extensions.name: lei
extensions.description: LEI ISO 17442 Legal Entity Identifier validation (mod-97 / ISO 7064)

extensions.name: lemmatize
extensions.description: Dictionary-based lemmatization for SQL. Ships a curated, in-binary WordNet-flavoured exception table covering irregular nouns/verbs/ adjectives/adverbs plus a few regular forms; falls through to the Snowball stemmer (rust-stemmers) when nothing in the dictionary matches.

extensions.name: linalg
extensions.description: Dense linear algebra primitives for SQL: matrix multiply, transpose, determinant, inverse, linear-system solve, eigenvalues, rank, trace, norm.

extensions.name: list
extensions.description: JSON-array-backed list manipulation array_append, array_prepend, array_cat / array_concat, array_length, array_position, array_remove, array_to_string, array_slice, array_sort, array_distinct, array_contains, array_reverse, flatten.

extensions.name: listargs
extensions.description: `listargs(json)` — eponymous TVF that yields one row per element of a JSON array. Sibling to vec_each but value-agnostic: cells come out as INTEGER / REAL / TEXT depending on what the JSON element parses to.

extensions.name: lorem
extensions.description: Lorem ipsum + filler text generation via the `lipsum` crate. Useful for seeding test databases, generating placeholder content, fuzz inputs.

extensions.name: lru-cache
extensions.description: LRU cache as in-process scalars. Per-connection (per host VM), in-memory only — values do not persist across CLI runs. Backed by lru 0.12.

extensions.name: lz4
extensions.description: LZ4 compression scalars. Backed by `lz4_flex` (pure-Rust, no C deps, ~100 KB of code). Two operating modes:

extensions.name: mac
extensions.description: MAC address (EUI-48) parsing + canonicalization, hand-rolled

extensions.name: mac-oui
extensions.description: MAC address parsing + IEEE OUI vendor lookup.

extensions.name: mailto
extensions.description: mailto: URI parser decompose into recipient + subject + body

extensions.name: math
extensions.description: Math scalar functions for SQLite: trig, log, exp, root, power, angle conversion, plus constants. 32 scalar functions backed by the pure-Rust `libm` crate so the wasm32-wasip2 build needs no host math runtime.

extensions.name: mbox
extensions.description: mbox / maildir email-format reader for SQL.

extensions.name: mgrs
extensions.description: Military Grid Reference System (MGRS) coordinate extension for SQLite: convert between lat/lng (WGS84) and MGRS grid strings, parse + validate MGRS, and report grid-square / precision. MGRS is the DoD coordinate standard built on UTM (8 deg S ..

extensions.name: morse
extensions.description: International Morse code encode/decode scalars. Hand-rolled (no crate dep, ~150 LOC table).

extensions.name: mqtt-parse
extensions.description: MQTT control packet parsing (NOT a client). Decodes MQTT v3.1.1 and v5.0 wire-format packets from BLOBs into SQL scalars.

extensions.name: multi-comparison
extensions.description: Multiple comparison corrections for SQL p-value arrays. Companion to `hypothesis` the obvious follow-up once you start computing more than one p-value at a time. Hand-rolled (no external statistics dependency):

extensions.name: nanoid
extensions.description: URL-safe short IDs. Lighter than UUID for ID columns that just need uniqueness, not 128-bit collision resistance.

extensions.name: natsort
extensions.description: Natural sort comparison (file2 < file10)

extensions.name: ngrams
extensions.description: N-gram tokenization scalars (character + word) for SQL.

extensions.name: nmea
extensions.description: NMEA 0183 GPS sentence parsing.

extensions.name: number-theory
extensions.description: Number-theory primitives for SQLite: primality, factorization, modular arithmetic, totient, Jacobi / Legendre symbols, gcd / lcm and the extended Euclidean algorithm.

extensions.name: numeric
extensions.description: Numerical methods extension for SQLite: univariate root finding (Brent), numerical integration (Simpson + Gauss-Legendre 5-node), central-difference differentiation, linear and natural-cubic-spline interpolation, polynomial least-squares fitting (Vandermonde + normal equations),

extensions.name: numfmt
extensions.description: Number formatting: commas, ordinals, scientific, percent

extensions.name: oauth-pkce
extensions.description: OAuth 2.0 PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange, RFC 7636) helpers for SQLite. The auth-helpers family: paired with `jwt` (token verifier), `totp` (second factor), and `pwhash` (password storage); PKCE is what public clients (mobile / SPA / CLI) use to bind an authorization-code exch

extensions.name: onnx
extensions.description: ONNX inference scalars via the pure-Rust `tract-onnx` crate. Loads a model from disk, returns a session handle, runs inference with a JSON-encoded input vector.

extensions.name: parquet
extensions.description: Read-only Parquet vtab over the upstream `parquet` crate (same crate the user's ~/git/parquet-wasm component wraps). Future architectural improvement: WAC-compose against parquet-wasm + arrow-wasm to share a single Arrow runtime across the cli; for now we link the crate directly

extensions.name: parsers
extensions.description: Small parsers and converters. All hand-rolled no external deps, fast wasm build, small artifact.

extensions.name: pdf-meta
extensions.description: PDF document metadata extractor for SQLite: pulls Title, Author, Subject, Creator, Producer, CreationDate, ModDate, Keywords, page count, PDF version, and encrypted-state from a PDF blob. The document-side counterpart to `exif` / `image-meta`. Backed by `lopdf` 0.

extensions.name: perceptual-hash
extensions.description: Perceptual image hashing for similarity / dedup: pHash (8x8 DCT), dHash (difference hash), and aHash (average hash) over PNG + JPEG blobs. Each hash is a 64-bit BLOB (8 bytes); compare with hash_distance() to get the Hamming distance.

extensions.name: pgp
extensions.description: OpenPGP key parsing + signature verification for SQL (RFC 4880).

extensions.name: phone
extensions.description: Phone number validation + canonicalization via the `phonenumber` crate (Rust port of Google's libphonenumber). Covers parsing, validation, and the four standard format styles.

extensions.name: phone-prefix
extensions.description: Phone country detection from E.164 international prefix

extensions.name: pinyin
extensions.description: Chinese hanzi -> pinyin transliteration for SQL. Wraps the pure-rust `pinyin` crate (mozillazg) so callers can normalize Han characters into latin pinyin for search, sort, indexing, or display.

extensions.name: pmtiles
extensions.description: Read-only PMTiles v3 vtab over the `oxigdal-pmtiles` crate. PMTiles is a single-file map-tile archive format (Hilbert- curve indexed tiles + JSON metadata header).

extensions.name: polyline-simplify
extensions.description: Douglas-Peucker (Ramer-Douglas-Peucker) and Visvalingam-Whyatt polyline simplification for SQL. Wraps `geo` 0.30's `Simplify` and `SimplifyVw` traits.

extensions.name: postcode
extensions.description: Multi-country postal code validation (US ZIP, UK, CA, DE, FR, JP)

extensions.name: priority-queue
extensions.description: Named heap-backed priority queues with thread-local state.

extensions.name: publicsuffix
extensions.description: Public Suffix List (Mozilla PSL) scalars for SQL. Backed by the `psl` 2 crate (pure-Rust, no_std, statically embeds the PSL revision as native Rust no async / lookup-table at runtime, no network fetch).

extensions.name: pwhash
extensions.description: Password hashing scalars: Argon2id, bcrypt, PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256/512, and scrypt. Pairs with the `jwt` extension and the auth wasm handler jwt can verify a signed token, this can verify a user's password against a stored hash.

extensions.name: qrcode
extensions.description: QR code generation: SVG + unicode block + JSON 0/1 grid + size + version. ISO/IEC 18004.

extensions.name: radix
extensions.description: Integer base conversion (2-36)

extensions.name: regexp
extensions.description: Regular-expression scalars: regexp_like / regexp_substr / regexp_replace, plus the bare `regexp` operator SQLite looks up when SQL says `text REGEXP pattern`.

extensions.name: roaring
extensions.description: Roaring bitmap scalars exact-set membership at scale, with O(1) cardinality and fast union/intersection/difference. Complements the probabilistic set structures in the catalog (bloom, hyperloglog, count-min); roaring is the exact-set partner for sparse-but-not-too- sparse u32 set

extensions.name: robotstxt
extensions.description: robots.txt parsing + matching for SQLite. Wraps the `robotstxt` crate (Folyd) -- a native Rust port of Google's reference C++ robots.txt parser and matcher (the parser Googlebot actually uses).

extensions.name: roman
extensions.description: Roman numeral encode/decode scalars. Hand-rolled (no crate dep, ~30 LOC).

extensions.name: rsa
extensions.description: RSA signing, verification, encryption and decryption for SQL.

extensions.name: s2
extensions.description: Google S2 geometry library, exposed as i64 cell ids. Different (and historically older) discrete global grid than H3 — S2 is the go-to for region queries + large-scale coverings; H3 is the go-to for hexagonal aggregation / neighbor lookups.

extensions.name: secp256k1
extensions.description: secp256k1 ECDSA + signature recovery for SQL the Bitcoin / Ethereum key curve, SECG SEC 2 (also called K-256). Sister to `jwt` (which has HMAC + EdDSA / Ed25519) and `tls-cert` (which has nistp / RSA via x509-parser).

extensions.name: semver
extensions.description: Semantic Versioning scalars via dtolnay's `semver` crate (Cargo's flavor of semver the de-facto standard).

extensions.name: sentence-split
extensions.description: Sentence boundary detection for SQL.

extensions.name: sentiment
extensions.description: Text sentiment scoring via VADER (Valence Aware Dictionary and sEntiment Reasoner), a rule-based lexical analyzer especially calibrated for social- media-style short text.

extensions.name: sequence
extensions.description: PG/Snowflake sequence helpers nextval(name), currval(name), setval(name, value). Sequence state is process-local (thread_local HashMap) matches the gap-analysis function but not the persistence semantics of PG sequences.

extensions.name: serialize-cli
extensions.description: `.serialize` and `.deserialize` as a wasm dot-command extension.

extensions.name: series
extensions.description: `generate_series(START, STOP, STEP)` table-valued function. Port of SQLite's well-known ext/misc/series.c to the canonical `sqlite:extension/tabular` world. Eponymous vtab no explicit `CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE` needed; SQL just calls it:

extensions.name: session-cli
extensions.description: `.session` as a wasm dot-command extension.

extensions.name: setops
extensions.description: set operations on JSON arrays

extensions.name: sha1
extensions.description: Standalone SHA-1 hash extension for SQLite (legacy / git interop).

extensions.name: sha3
extensions.description: SHA-3 (NIST FIPS 202) port of SQLite shathree

extensions.name: sha3sum-cli
extensions.description: `.sha3sum` as a wasm dot-command extension.

extensions.name: signal-processing
extensions.description: DSP primitives extension for SQLite. Sits next to `fft` and gives SQL a time-domain signal-processing surface: biquad IIR filters (low-pass / high-pass / band-pass), autocorrelation, full linear convolution, moving average, peak detection, and RMS energy.

extensions.name: sitemap-xml
extensions.description: sitemap.xml + sitemap-index parsers for SQLite. Reads the sitemaps.org protocol (https://www.sitemaps.org/protocol.html) shapes -- a `<urlset>` document of `<url>` records, or a `<sitemapindex>` document of `<sitemap>` records -- and surfaces the contents to SQL as JSON.

extensions.name: sketches
extensions.description: Deeper streaming sketches: t-digest (quantile estimation better than count_min for percentiles) and MinHash (Jaccard similarity).

extensions.name: skiplist
extensions.description: Named sorted-set ordered containers with thread-local state.

extensions.name: spellfix1
extensions.description: Fuzzy / typo-tolerant text-match vtab. Levenshtein edit-distance over a source TEXT column. Pure-Rust port of SQLite's spellfix1 simplified surface brute-force edit distance with early-exit, no Soundex prefilter in v1.

extensions.name: sqlean-vsv
extensions.description: Virtual CSV view port of sqlean's `vsv` vtab module.

extensions.name: sqlink-meta-cli
extensions.description: The `.sqlink` meta-cli as a wasm dot-command extension.

extensions.name: sqlite-utils-data
extensions.description: sqlite-utils data-manipulation surface as SQLink dot commands.

extensions.name: sqlite-utils-fts
extensions.description: FTS5 helpers as a dot-command extension port of sqlite-utils enable-fts / disable-fts / rebuild-fts / populate-fts / search.

extensions.name: sqlite-utils-maint
extensions.description: sqlite-utils-style maintenance dot commands as a wasm extension.

extensions.name: sqlite-utils-schema
extensions.description: sqlite-utils schema commands as wasm dot commands.

extensions.name: sqlparse
extensions.description: SQL parsing scalars over the `sqlparser` crate (ANSI SQL:2011 dialect with extensions). Returns shape and table-touching information about a SQL string without executing it.

extensions.name: ssh-key
extensions.description: OpenSSH key file parsing for SQL (RFC 4253 + RFC 4716 + the modern OpenSSH key format).

extensions.name: ssn
extensions.description: US Social Security Number format validation + masking

extensions.name: stats
extensions.description: Statistical aggregate functions: stddev_samp, stddev_pop, var_samp, var_pop, median, percentile, mode.

extensions.name: stdsql
extensions.description: Cross-DB standard SQL scalars greatest, least, left, right, lpad, rpad, repeat, space, starts_with, ends_with, translate, to_hex, bit_length, initcap, plus aliases (if, chr, ascii, char_length, from_hex).

extensions.name: stemmer
extensions.description: Snowball stemmer for SQL. Wraps the pure-rust `rust-stemmers` crate so FTS5 / text-search rankings can normalize tokens to their stems.

extensions.name: sys-compat
extensions.description: Cross-DB system/identity scalars current_user, session_user, current_database, current_schema, version, etc. Returns sensible constants so BI tools and ORMs that probe with SELECT version() / SELECT current_user succeed against SQLink.

extensions.name: tar
extensions.description: tar archive parsing as SQL scalars. Wraps `tar` 0.4 so SQL callers can introspect a tar archive that lives in a BLOB column.

extensions.name: template
extensions.description: Jinja2-style template rendering via the `minijinja` crate. Useful for generating text from row data without client-side templating.

extensions.name: text-nlp
extensions.description: Deeper text / NLP helpers. Complements text-utils (sql_normalize + prefixes) and spellfix1 (Levenshtein).

extensions.name: text-utils
extensions.description: Text utilities — two small extras bundled into one .wasm:

extensions.name: time
extensions.description: Date / time helpers that fill gaps in SQLite's built-in `date()`/`datetime()`/`strftime()` family. All scalars accept ISO-8601 strings (or any SQLite-recognised timestamp format) and return either strings or integers.

extensions.name: time-series
extensions.description: Time-series helpers complementing the existing `time` extension. Adds bucketing + gap-fill primitives for observability/analytics workloads.

extensions.name: tld-list
extensions.description: IANA gold-source root zone TLD list scalars.

extensions.name: tls-cert
extensions.description: X.509 v3 certificate parsing for SQL (RFC 5280).

extensions.name: toml
extensions.description: TOML ↔ JSON codec scalars. Round-trip configuration text through SQL and pluck individual values from a TOML document by dotted key path. Sister codec to binary-codecs (msgpack/cbor); json1 covers the JSON side of the conversion.

extensions.name: totp
extensions.description: TOTP (RFC 6238) + HOTP (RFC 4226) scalars. The second-factor half of the in-catalog auth surface (jwt = first factor, pwhash = password, aead = vault encryption).

extensions.name: totype
extensions.description: port of SQLite totype.c (lossless cast)

extensions.name: trie
extensions.description: Prefix-tree vtab over a TEXT column. Pre-built per-instance from the source table on first query; cached in a thread_local that lives for the cli session.

extensions.name: uint
extensions.description: uint collation (ext/misc/uint.c port)

extensions.name: ulid
extensions.description: ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier) scalar functions. 128-bit IDs with a 48-bit ms-epoch timestamp prefix + 80 bits of randomness, encoded in Crockford base32 (26 chars).

extensions.name: unicode
extensions.description: Unicode-correctness scalars the companion to `text-utils` (ASCII ops) and `case` (identifier case conversion).

extensions.name: unitconv
extensions.description: Unit conversion (length, mass, temperature, time)

extensions.name: unnest
extensions.description: `unnest(V)` — eponymous TVF that yields one row per element of a packed f32 vector. Sibling to extensions/vec (the scalar surface) and extensions/vec0 (the kNN vtab).

extensions.name: url
extensions.description: URL decomposition / canonicalization scalars via the WHATWG-conforming `url` crate (Servo's rust-url).

extensions.name: useragent
extensions.description: User-Agent parsing via woothee. Extract browser, OS, device, and bot-detection.

extensions.name: utm
extensions.description: Universal Transverse Mercator (UTM) coordinate extension for SQLite: convert between WGS84 lat/lng and UTM (zone + hemisphere + easting + northing).

extensions.name: uuid
extensions.description: UUID scalars: `uuid()` (= `uuidv4`), `uuidv4()`, `uuidv7()`. Returns the canonical hyphenated form as SQL TEXT.

extensions.name: vat
extensions.description: EU + common non-EU VAT identification number validation.

extensions.name: vcard
extensions.description: vCard parsing scalars (RFC 6350 / RFC 2426) via the `vcard4` crate. Sister to the existing `ical` extension — vcards are the contact-list parallel to iCalendar's events.

extensions.name: vec
extensions.description: sqlite-vec scalar surface vector similarity primitives for embedded k-NN. Pure-Rust port; no FFI, no upstream C compile.

extensions.name: vec0
extensions.description: vec0 wrapping kNN vtab over a regular source table. Sibling to extensions/vec (the scalar surface). Designed for the "already have a table of embeddings" pattern:

extensions.name: vec_each
extensions.description: `vec_each(V)` — eponymous TVF that yields one row per element of a packed f32 vector. Sibling to extensions/vec (the scalar surface) and extensions/vec0 (the kNN vtab).

extensions.name: vin
extensions.description: VIN (Vehicle Identification Number) ISO 3779 validation + decomposition

extensions.name: wal-archive
extensions.description: Continuous WAL-frame shipping + on-demand snapshot extension for sqlink (any deployment: native, browser, edge, mobile, embedded).

extensions.name: wasm-introspect
extensions.description: Wasm module introspection scalars. Reads a .wasm BLOB and surfaces the parts you ask about: validity, version byte, custom section names, import / export tables, function count, initial memory pages. Useful for SQL-side queries over a catalog of components (e.g.

extensions.name: web-parsers
extensions.description: Web-data parsers JSONPath + HTML CSS selection. Bundled into one extension because the SQL surface is parallel (extract a value from a structured-text BLOB / TEXT).

extensions.name: webauthn
extensions.description: WebAuthn Level 2/3 registration + authentication verification for SQL.

extensions.name: whois-parse
extensions.description: Parse WHOIS response TEXT (not network lookup). Hand-rolled parser tolerates the three common WHOIS line shapes seen across ARIN, RIPE, APNIC, LACNIC, AFRINIC, and most registrar formats:

extensions.name: x25519
extensions.description: X25519 elliptic-curve Diffie-Hellman key exchange (RFC 7748) for SQL. Sister to `secp256k1` (Bitcoin / Ethereum curve) and `jwt` (which already pulls Ed25519 via ed25519-dalek).

extensions.name: yaml
extensions.description: YAML <-> JSON codec scalars + dotted-path lookup.

extensions.name: zipfile
extensions.description: zipfile vtab. Pure-Rust `zip` crate read-only access to ZIP archives by file path.

extensions.name: zorder
extensions.description: port of SQLite zorder.c (Morton curve)

extensions.name: zstd
extensions.description: Zstandard compression scalars. Backed by the `zstd` crate (wrapping the C `libzstd` reference encoder/decoder via `zstd-sys`). Both compress and decompress are supported on wasm32-wasip2 the C source cross-compiles cleanly against wasi-sdk clang (probed before commit; see PLAN-ex
